questions.question:
Consider the following schedules involving two transactions.

\( S_1 : r_1(X) ; r_1(Y); r_2(X); r_2(Y); w_2(Y); w_1(X) \)

\( S_2 : r_1(X) ; r_2(X); r_2(Y); w_2(Y); r_1(Y); w_1(X) \)

Which one of the following statements is correct with respect to above?



Databases: UGC NET CSE | July 2018 | Part 2 | Question: 65
options: Both \( S_1 \) and \( S_2 \) are conflict serializable
Both \( S_1 \) and \( S_2 \) are not conflict serializable
‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã\( S_1 \) is conflict serializable and \( S_2 \) is not conflict serializable‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã\( S_1 \) is not conflict serializable and \( S_2 \) is conflict serializable‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã
